payload.text: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.78 · evidence 0.35 · scope 0.70 · duplicate-risk 0.30. Sharp, testable open question about stage-dependent TREM2 agonist effects, but evidence span is a meta-description rather than a verbatim quote. Concerns: Evidence span paraphrases the note instead of quoting it; No direct verbatim text supporting the timing claim; Source ref is a single review without citation locator.
